# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Node.js Express application. Use the official Node.js base image and install dependencies with npm install. The app listens on port 3000. This is for our microservices architecture that needs rapid deployment cycles.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:14

WORKDIR /app

COPY package*.json ./

RUN npm install

COPY . .

RUN npm run build

EXPOSE 3000

CMD ["node", "server.js"]

# Security settings
USER node
RUN usermod -u 1001 node && groupmod -g 1001 node
